stemHtml: A pilot has completed his/her type rating and hasn’t flown for the preceding 60 days. Is the pilot allowed to take passengers on a flight?

options.a: No, because he/she needs to have one take off and landing in the preceding 30 days.
options.b: Yes, provided he/she made 3 take offs and landings in the preceding 120 days.
options.c: Yes, provided he/she made 3 take offs and landings in the preceding 90 days.
options.d: No, because he/she needs to make an extra flight before taking passengers.
